title: V1.1 Architecture Alignment Blockers (TD-1~TD-6)
notes: TD-1..TD-4 previously merged (see git log). TD-5: BundleBuilder sets sha256:<hexlower> over JSON-serialized deltas. TD-6: schemas/domain/user.schema.json + common AccountStatus/SubscriptionTier; nexus-domain user module; codegen committed. Verified: cargo test/clippy, pnpm typecheck, validate-schemas. Open: plan manual E2E for sync push to platform (TD-1 checklist); QC/QA sign-off before Done.

metadata.description: Resolve 6 Critical+High tech debt items from architecture alignment review: TD-1 (sync wiring), TD-2 (WorldStatus enum), TD-3 (MembershipStatus enum), TD-4 (JSON Schema enum typing), TD-5 (canonical_hash), TD-6 (User aggregate). Grouped into 4 task batches by technical domain and dependency order.
metadata.scope: TD-1 through TD-6; enum alignment, schema codegen, sync wiring, domain models
metadata.effort: L — 4 task groups (~6-10 agent sessions total: B1 XS, B2 M, B3 L, B4 S+M)
